purpose: Manual review list for Standard cards whose effects may require deck-tracker history state beyond remaining deck count.

source.note: Death Knight class is corrected from raw hsdata CLASS=1 because generated CardDef currently maps CLASS=1 to NEUTRAL.

criteria.caveat: This is an intentionally inclusive candidate list for human review; medium-priority Deathrattle/death-event rows may not all require special tracker logic.

cards.cardTextZhCN: 在本回合中每有一个友方随从死亡，抽一张牌。@（抽@张牌）
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 在本回合中每有一个友方随从死亡，抽一张牌。（抽张牌）

text.zhCN: 在本回合中每有一个友方随从死亡，抽一张牌。@（抽@张牌）
text.enUS: Draw a card for each friendly minion that died this turn.@ (@)
text.zhCNPlain: 在本回合中每有一个友方随从死亡，抽一张牌。（抽张牌）
text.enUSPlain: Draw a card for each friendly minion that died this turn. ()

matchReasons: text references died/dead/resurrected card pools
text reacts to death/destruction events

matchReasons: text/mechanics includes or interacts with Deathrattle/亡语

cards.cardTextZhCN: 战吼：弃掉你的手牌。亡语：抽三张牌。

cards.cardTextZhCN: 召唤一个在本局对战中死亡的友方恶魔。 注能（@个恶魔）：改为召唤三个。

reviewFields.rank: 1-based order within this class JSON file after the current sort.
reviewFields.cardRank: Alias of rank for manual review tools that expect cardRank.
reviewFields.cardTextZhCN: Original Simplified Chinese rules text, including markup.
reviewFields.cardTextZhCNPlain: Simplified Chinese rules text with markup stripped for easier reading.
